entries.trigger: User-directed modernization: use Claude Code references to update knowledge base and leverage modern features (Hooks, Checkpointing, etc.)

applied: Rewrote hooks-json-template to cover all 28 events, 5 handler types, if filter, asyncRewake, once, terminalSequence
Rewrote plugin-json-template to cover all 18 manifest fields including displayName/userConfig/dependencies/monitors/channels/outputStyles/lspServers
Replaced TodoWrite with Task* family across primitives-guide, agent-design, agent-template, both SKILL.md files, and all four eval pipeline commands
Added Monitor/LSP/EnterPlanMode/EnterWorktree/Cron*/RemoteTrigger/PushNotification/SendMessage/NotebookEdit/Skill/ShareOnboardingGuide sections to primitives-guide
Added new shared/checkpointing.md documenting Bash-edit warnings for generated skills
Documented single-file plugin auto-loading pattern (v2.1.142+) and path-rule semantics in skill-anatomy.md
Modernized agent frontmatter docs with effort/maxTurns/isolation/background/disallowedTools fields and current model IDs
Added Write to tools lists of analyzer, comparator, grader, skill-validator agents
Canonicalized feedback.json next_action enum to iterate/accept/reject across schema, viewer, and command
Fixed run_eval.py <-> eval-skill.md signature mismatch (added --config-label, removed unsupported --skill-path)
Fixed aggregate_history.py to read schema-correct nested field paths with legacy fallback
Raised quick_validate.py severity for kebab name/directory checks from HIGH to CRITICAL
Standardized allowed-tools format on YAML list across all four commands
Reconciled local-config-pattern.md variables and added userConfig guidance preamble
Thinned quality-checklist.md to remove duplicates of skill-validator check table and trigger-test spec
Added Modern primitives check to skill-validator scanning for deprecated TodoWrite and stale model IDs
Reconciled inline-hooks rule: re-tested v2.1.146 confirms inline plugin.json hooks are valid
Updated project MEMORY.md to reflect corrected inline-hooks support
Archived docs/ideation/ and 2026-03-25 design doc under docs/archive/
Added 0.7.0 modernization section to docs/contract.md
Bumped plugin version 0.6.0 -> 0.7.0

entries.trigger: systematic improvement (no braindump) — improve create-skill and improve-skill sequentially; revealed surviving TodoWrite refs and post-0.7.0 hook-rule drift

applied: Replaced remaining TodoWrite references with TaskCreate/TaskUpdate in improve-skill SKILL.md (lines 160, 219), docs/spec.md (lines 158, 166), shared/workflow-patterns.md (3 pattern descriptions), shared/templates/command-template.md (2 allowed-tools rows), commands/eval-skill.md (line 99)
Rewrote skill-generator and scaffold-writer hook-placement rules to permit inline hooks in plugin.json, matching the modernized validator and hooks-json-template
Added Agent tool to skill-generator tools list to support parallel-phase spawning its own Step 4 already required
Tightened create-skill description: added 'add a skill' trigger, named improve-skill as the alternative for modification requests
Tightened improve-skill description: 'points to' -> 'references', named code-review as the alternative for non-skill review
Folded Step 4b into Step 4 as ### Optional subsections in both SKILL.md files, re-aligning with spec's stated 6-step pipeline
Bumped plugin version 0.7.0 -> 0.7.1

entries.trigger: braindump: steal from walkinglabs/learn-harness-engineering harness-creator to improve skill creation, enable self-improving skills, and add full harness/harness-creator capability

applied: Phase 7: Ported 6 reference docs from harness-creator (memory-persistence, context-engineering, tool-registry, multi-agent, lifecycle-bootstrap, gotchas) into shared/references/ with MIT attribution
Phase 7: Wrote shared/agentic-subsystems.md documenting the 5-subsystem mental model (Instructions/State/Verification/Scope/Lifecycle) shared between forge-skill and forge-harness
Phase 7: Restructured shared/anti-patterns.md to Problem/Golden Rules/Trade-offs/Implementation/Gotchas/Related Patterns shape; all 36 anti-patterns preserved with severity tags
Phase 7: Wrote scripts/validate-skill.mjs (344 lines) — pure Node deterministic skill validator scoring 5 subsystems with JSON+HTML output
Phase 8: Wrote shared/templates/evals-template.json and validate-mjs-template.mjs — every generated skill now ships with evals/evals.json and evals/validate.mjs
Phase 8: Updated skill-generator agent to emit evals/ artifacts (new Process step 10); added constraint requiring evals/ for marketplace skills
Phase 8: Updated skill-validator agent to delegate structural checks to validate-skill.mjs; removed 18-row inline check table; retained semantic checks only
Phase 8: Updated skill-optimizer to consume per-skill validate.mjs output; Structural Compliance dimension sourced from deterministic script
Phase 8: Updated create-skill and improve-skill SKILL.md files to wire in validate-skill.mjs invocations
Phase 9: Created new forge-harness skill (SKILL.md + command + trigger-tests + evals/) that scaffolds AGENTS.md+feature_list.json+progress.md+init.sh+session-handoff.md into target repos
Phase 9: Ported create-harness.mjs and validate-harness.mjs (+ harness-utils.mjs shared lib) from harness-creator with MIT attribution
Phase 9: Copied 6 harness templates into shared/templates/harness/
Phase 9: Updated intake-analyst to recognize harness-scaffolding intents; new artifact type harness-scaffold; new required Routing field selects forge-skill vs forge-harness
Phase 10: Bumped plugin.json 0.7.1 -> 0.8.0; updated description to acknowledge harness scaffolding capability
Phase 10: Updated docs/contract.md with 0.8.0 problem statement extension, goals 6+7, in-scope section, and reaffirmed cross-agent compat is out-of-scope
Phase 10: Updated docs/spec.md with 0.8.0 component manifest tables, Phase 7-10 execution plan, dependency graph
Pre-existing skills (create-skill, improve-skill) score 100/100 on the new validate-skill.mjs; new forge-harness also scores 100/100
